iterations.label: telegram-local-ingest-mvp
iterations.goal: Build a Telegram Local Bot API Server based local ingest worker that writes immutable Obsidian raw bundles and triggers a constrained LLM wiki ingest adapter.
iterations.summary: In progress. Sprint 0 seeded the downstream project from vibe-doctor. Sprint 1 added the Telegram Local Bot API baseline, startup checks, tests, and operator setup docs. Sprint 2 added SQLite schema, repository functions, state transitions, retry eligibility, and event history. Sprint 3 added Telegram update parsing, command parsing, allowlist checks, durable offset polling, and /ingest job creation. Sprint 4 added controlled Telegram file import into runtime staging/archive with hashing, duplicate detection, max size policy, and path safety. Sprint 5 added immutable Obsidian raw bundle writing with manifest/source/log files and finalized overwrite protection. Next is Sprint 6 RTZR STT.
